name: jiggle-physics
desc: An open reference standard for jiggle physics: weight-painted regions + damped spring bones, one rule (vertex += weight * boneJiggle). Portable, dependency-fre…
descFull: An open reference standard for jiggle physics: weight-painted regions + damped spring bones, one rule (vertex += weight * boneJiggle). Portable, dependency-free, WebGL demo included. By the xlovecam team.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: Soft Body Jiggle Physics
